seen.instruction: Place red block, green block, and blue block at the center and stack blue block on green block, then green block on red block.

decomposition.instruction: Place red block, green block, and blue block at the center and stack blue block on green block, then green block on red block.
decomposition.canonical_task: Place red, green, and blue blocks at the center, then stack them in order: blue on green, then green on red.
decomposition.final_goal: Three-block stack at center with blue on top, green in middle, red at bottom.

stages.success_criteria: Red block is positioned at the center of the table.
Green block is positioned at the center of the table, near red block.
Blue block is positioned at the center of the table, near other blocks.
Green block is stably stacked on top of red block at center.
Blue block is stably stacked on top of green block, completing three-block tower.

unseen.instruction: Bring red block, green block, blue block to the table's center and stack them: blue block on green block, green block on red block.

decomposition.instruction: Bring red block, green block, blue block to the table's center and stack them: blue block on green block, green block on red block.
decomposition.canonical_task: Move red, green, and blue blocks to the center of the table and stack them in order: red at bottom, green on red, blue on green.
decomposition.final_goal: A stack of three blocks at the table center with red at bottom, green in middle, and blue on top.

stages.success_criteria: Red block is positioned at the center of the table.

completed_subgoals_before_stage: Red block is at table center.
stages.success_criteria: Green block is positioned at the center of the table, near the red block.

completed_subgoals_before_stage: Red block is at table center.
Green block is at table center.
stages.success_criteria: Green block is stably stacked on top of the red block at the table center.

completed_subgoals_before_stage: Red block is at table center.
Green block is stacked on red block.
stages.success_criteria: Blue block is positioned at the center of the table, near the green-on-red stack.

completed_subgoals_before_stage: Red block is at table center.

stages.success_criteria: Blue block is stably stacked on top of the green block, completing a three-block stack at the table center.
